motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution:
def maxScoreIndices(nums):
    result = []
    for i in range(len(nums)):
        left_sum = 0
        right_sum = 0
        for j in range(i, len(nums)):
            left_sum += nums[j]
            right_sum += nums[j]
            if left_sum > right_sum:
                result.append(i)
    return result

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
